title: QUILL Speech Project Profile
description: Per-project remembered speech settings, stored at <project>/.quill/speech-project.json. Carries the synthesizer, output format, chapterization, text normalization, and active pronunciation dictionaries so a folder of documents is configured once. See docs/planning/speech-project-format.md and §4.10 of docs/planning/batch-document-to-speech-plan.md.

synthesizer.description: The chosen TTS engine and its voice / pacing.

engine.description: Local synthesis engine. Cloud engines are excluded from batch (§2.3).

voice.description: Engine voice id/name (e.g. a SAPI voice token, a Kokoro voice, an eSpeak language).

speed.description: Speed multiplier for engines that use one (Kokoro).

extra.description: Engine-specific keys. Recognised: piper_executable, piper_model, dectalk_executable, dectalk_dictionary, espeak_executable. Values are paths/strings.

discovery.description: Which files in the project folder are converted.

recursive.description: Descend into subfolders when discovering documents.

include_glob.description: Semicolon/comma-separated glob list; only matching files are kept (empty = all). Matched against the file name and its path relative to the source folder.

exclude_glob.description: Semicolon/comma-separated glob list; matching files are dropped (wins over include).

max_file_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this many bytes. 0 = no cap.

format.description: wav (always available) or a compressed format (requires ffmpeg; falls back to wav with a note). m4b is the audiobook container.

skip_existing.description: Legacy alias for on_existing="skip": skip a file whose output already exists.

on_existing.description: What to do when the target file exists: skip (cheap resume), overwrite, or write a unique "name (2).ext" sibling.

mp3_vbr_quality.description: libmp3lame VBR quality (-q:a): 0 best/largest .. 9 smallest. Only used for mp3 output.

wav_sample_rate.description: Re-sample WAV output to this rate (requires ffmpeg). null = leave as synthesized.

wav_channels.description: Down-mix WAV output to this many channels (requires ffmpeg). null = leave as synthesized.

flatten.description: Collapse the source folder tree into a single output folder instead of mirroring it.

filename_template.description: Rename output stems. Fields: {stem}, {index} (1-based), {index0}, {total}; zero-padding like {index:03d} works. Empty = keep the source stem.

mode.description: none = one flat file; single = one file with MP3 chapter markers; separate = one file per article.

sound_enabled.description: Play a transition earcon at each article boundary; also emits a with-tones file variant.

sound_id.description: Sound-pack sound id for the transition earcon. "" = the bundled placeholder chime.

article_gap_ms.description: Silence inserted between articles, in milliseconds.

sentence_gap_ms.description: Silence inserted between sentences within a section, in milliseconds. 0 = off (one synthesis call per section).

tail_padding_ms.description: Silence appended after each section's speech, in milliseconds, to prevent end-of-clip cutoff. 0 = off.

intro_section_title.description: Title for the lead-in section before the first heading (and for documents with no headings).

combine_headings.description: When true, fold empty (bodyless) headings into the next article before synthesis, joining their titles (ACB-style).

normalize_loudness.description: When true, normalize each output to ACX audiobook loudness with a two-pass loudnorm pass before encoding.

round_robin_voices.description: Ordered voice ids (of the chosen engine) cycled one per article/heading. Empty or a single voice uses the single synthesizer voice.

normalization.description: Serialized TextNormalizationOptions (§4.9). Empty object = recommended defaults. See quill/core/speech/text_normalize.py.

pronunciation.description: Active pronunciation dictionaries for the project (§4.7).

enabled.description: Master toggle for pronunciation correction in this project.

dictionaries.description: Ordered references to the dictionaries this project uses.

id.description: Dictionary id (the JSON file stem for quill-json dictionaries).

scope.description: global = app data dir; project = the project folder's .quill/pronunciation/.

format.description: Dictionary file format. quill-json is native; sapi-lexicon and csv are reserved for future importers.

path.description: For project scope: path relative to the project root. "" = resolve by id in the standard location.

metadata.description: Audiobook / file tags stamped on compressed outputs (none for WAV). The per-file title defaults to the document stem.

album_artist.description: Album artist. Empty falls back to author.

execution.description: How the batch runs: error policy, concurrency, and run report.

stop_on_error.description: Stop the whole batch on the first hard error instead of continuing.

retry_count.description: Extra synthesis attempts per file on a hard failure (flaky subprocess engines).

max_workers.description: Files synthesized at once. Clamped to 1 for SAPI 5 and Kokoro (single-apartment engines).

write_manifest.description: Write manifest.json and manifest.csv of the run into the output folder.

provider.description: Translation backend: ai_assistant (the configured AI provider) or libretranslate (local).

libretranslate_url.description: Base URL of the LibreTranslate server when provider is libretranslate.

targets.description: Each language to also export, with the voice that speaks it.

engine.description: Voice engine: espeak | sapi5 | openai | gemini | elevenlabs.

voice.description: Engine-native voice id for this language.
